productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Solid Grey T-shirt
description: Composition Grey polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed collar with pink and white tipping, long sleeves with pink and white tipping on the ribbed cuffs, appliquéd digit on the right sleeve, buttoned chest placket, embroidered and appliquéd branding on the left chest and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Tumble dry low Warm iron:Do not iron on decorations Project your love for the game with this stylish t-shirt from US Polo. The classic styling on this tee makes it perfect for casual and semi-formal occasions. Pair this with straight fit denims and canvas shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
